use_cases: Form submission and user interaction triggers
Standard interactive button with variant styling
Icon-only button for compact UI spaces
Polymorphic button component via asChild composition
ai_summary: A flexible, atomic button component built with Radix UI Slot for polymorphic composition and class-variance-authority for scalable variant management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes for diverse UI contexts.
